vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: Define role-based SPEC/ROADMAP reconciliation for migrate:vbrief; emit RECONCILIATION.md; add --strict; honor vbrief/migration-overrides.yaml; add per-field provenance.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief reconciliation strategy when SPEC and ROADMAP disagree (#496)

narratives.Overview: Implement per-dimension ownership (SPEC owns identity/bodies/acceptance/traces; ROADMAP owns completion; grouping preserved from both). Emit vbrief/migration/RECONCILIATION.md on disagreement. Add --strict exit-non-zero mode. Load vbrief/migration-overrides.yaml. Add sibling *_source provenance fields to scope narratives.
narratives.Problem: Current migrator collapses SPEC + ROADMAP into single implicit policy that is wrong in both stale directions, causing silent data loss or silent staleness. No signal to operator when reconciliation occurred.
narratives.Action: Edit scripts/migrate_vbrief.py to implement reconciliation components 1-5. Add vbrief/migration-overrides.yaml loader. Emit RECONCILIATION.md into vbrief/migration/. Plumb --strict through task migrate:vbrief. Orphan ROADMAP items route to vbrief/proposed/ with narrative.SourceConflict = 'missing-from-spec'.
narratives.Test: Synthetic fixtures under deft/tests/fixtures/ covering spec-stale, roadmap-stale, both-stale, clean. Assert RECONCILIATION.md produced and formatted; --strict exits non-zero on conflict; overrides file honored; orphans route to proposed/ with SourceConflict.
narratives.Outcome: Reconciliation explicit, auditable, and controllable. Feeds #499 lifecycle routing with reconciled status.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Role-based default merge policy (identity<-SPEC, status<-ROADMAP with SPEC tiebreaker, grouping from both)
Add --strict mode (exit non-zero on any conflict)
Add per-field *_source provenance to scope narratives
Orphan ROADMAP items route to vbrief/proposed/ with SourceConflict
Synthetic fixture tests for spec-stale / roadmap-stale / both-stale / clean
